description: remove tools/automode/configure and instead move the skip verification and auto mode buttons to a button on board tab called project settings that is just a drop down with square that you can click to turn blue or blank for on or off for the 2 settings. this drop down should not appear if selected project is all projects
title: Move skip verification and auto mode to project settings

descriptionHistory.description: remove tools/automode/configure and instead move the skip verification and auto mode buttons to a button on board tab called project settings that is just a drop down with square that you can click to turn blue or blank for on or off for the 2 settings. this drop down should not appear if selected project is all projects
